description: Style Note puma combines style with utility in their range of bags. With a dash of colour, innovative shapes and designs which follow fashion trends, this accessory will complete your outfit. Don't miss out on this must-have bag for the season! This backpack is easy to carry, ideal for your trips out. Product Details A blue and white backpack with striped patterns in the front and the Puma cat printed Two padded backpack handles and a short handle on top, padded back One main zippered compartment with an internal pocket with a flap One zippered compartment in front with organiser pockets Material and Care 100% Polyester Wipe clean with a damp cloth when required Do not use detergent Size Height: 44 cm Width: 35 cm Depth: 16 cm
